name: NeoIPC Admission Date must match enrollment admission date
description: Validates that the admission date in the enrollment and the admission date in the admission event are the same.
condition: V{event_date} != V{enrollment_date}

name: NeoIPC Admission Day of life 1
description: Causes an error on attempts to enter 1 as value for the admission day of life
condition: d2:hasValue( #{NeoIPC Admission type - current event value} ) && #{NeoIPC Admission type - current event value}  == 3 && #{NeoIPC Admission on day of life value} < 2

name: NeoIPC Admission Day of life value 150+
description: Issues a warning if the day of life at the time of admission is 150 ore more
condition: #{NeoIPC Admission on day of life value} >= 150

name: NeoIPC Admission Set Length of Stay
description: Automatically sets the Length of Stay for the current event
condition: true

name: NeoIPC Admission Set completed
condition: V{event_status} == 'COMPLETED'

name: NeoIPC Admission Type 1
description: Adjust the NeoIPC admission data entry form when the patient was delivered in the respective hospital or admitted on the day of birth
condition: !d2:hasValue( #{NeoIPC Admission type - current event value} ) || #{NeoIPC Admission type - current event value}  <= 2

name: NeoIPC Admission Type 2+
description: Adjust the NeoIPC admission data entry form when the patient was admitted on the day after birth or later
condition: d2:hasValue( #{NeoIPC Admission type - current event value} ) && #{NeoIPC Admission type - current event value}  == 3

name: NeoIPC BSI - unless no positive culture
description: Adjusts the dialog when "No positive culture" is disabled.
condition: !#{NeoIPC BSI - no positive culture}

name: NeoIPC BSI - when no positive culture
description: Adjusts the dialog when "No positive culture" is enabled
condition: #{NeoIPC BSI - no positive culture}

name: NeoIPC BSI Acidosis set count
description: Sets NeoIPC BSI Acidosis count to 1 if it is set to true.
condition: d2:hasValue( #{NeoIPC BSI Acidosis value} ) && #{NeoIPC BSI Acidosis value}

name: NeoIPC BSI Apnoea set count
description: Sets NeoIPC BSI Apnoea count to 1 if it is set to true.
condition: d2:hasValue( #{NeoIPC BSI Apnoea value} ) && #{NeoIPC BSI Apnoea value}

name: NeoIPC BSI Assign common laboratory findings count
description: Sets the variable for the common laboratory findings to 1 if any are set as present in the NeoIPC Core BSI dialog.
condition:
(#{NeoIPC BSI White blood cell count count} > 0)
||
(#{NeoIPC BSI Platelet count count} > 0)
||
(#{NeoIPC BSI CRP count} > 0)
||
(#{NeoIPC BSI Procalcitonin count} > 0)
||
(#{NeoIPC BSI IT ratio count} > 0)
||
(#{NeoIPC BSI Interleukin count} > 0)

name: NeoIPC BSI Assign first finding counts
description: Counts the findings (except for the common laboratory findings that count as 1) that are set as present in the NeoIPC Core BSI dialog and assigns the result to the variables relevant for the validation rule.
condition: true

name: NeoIPC BSI Assign total common finding counts
description: Assigns the total value for the clinical finding counts.
condition: true

name: NeoIPC BSI Bradycardia set count
description: Sets NeoIPC BSI Bradycardia count to 1 if it is set to true.
condition: d2:hasValue( #{NeoIPC BSI Bradycardia value} ) && #{NeoIPC BSI Bradycardia value}

name: NeoIPC BSI CRP set count
description: Sets NeoIPC BSI CRP count to 1 if it is set to true.
condition: d2:hasValue( #{NeoIPC BSI CRP value} ) && #{NeoIPC BSI CRP value}

name: NeoIPC BSI Clinical sepsis validation rule
description: Validates the findings in the NeoIPC Core BSI dialog against the clinical sepsis definition in the protocol
condition:
(
  (d2:hasValue(#{NeoIPC BSI - no positive culture}) && (#{NeoIPC BSI - no positive culture} == true))
  &&
  (!d2:hasValue(#{NeoIPC BSI Pathogen 1 value}))
  &&
  (!d2:hasValue(#{NeoIPC BSI Pathogen 2 value}))
  &&
  (!d2:hasValue(#{NeoIPC BSI Pathogen 3 value}))
)
&&
(
  (#{NeoIPC BSI - Antibiotic treatment} == false)
  ||
  (#{NeoIPC BSI Common sepsis total findings count} < 2)
)

name: NeoIPC BSI Day of life value less than 4
description: Issues a warning if the day of life at the time of a BSI event is 3 or less
condition: #{NeoIPC BSI on day of life current value} < 4

name: NeoIPC BSI Debug rule
description: A rule that shows several key/value pairs for debugging purposes
condition: false

description: Sets NeoIPC BSI Feeding intolerance count to 1 if it is set to true.
condition: d2:hasValue( #{NeoIPC BSI Feeding intolerance value} ) && #{NeoIPC BSI Feeding intolerance value}

description: Sets NeoIPC BSI Hyperglycaemia  count to 1 if it is set to true.

name: NeoIPC BSI IT ratio set count

name: NeoIPC BSI Interleukin set count

name: NeoIPC BSI Irritability set count
description: Sets NeoIPC BSI Irritability count to 1 if it is set to true.
condition: d2:hasValue( #{NeoIPC BSI Irritability value} ) && #{NeoIPC BSI Irritability value}

name: NeoIPC BSI LCBSI with common commensal detected multiple times or with AB-treatment >= 5 days validation rule
description: Validates the findings in the NeoIPC Core BSI dialog against the LCBSI definition in the protocol where a common commensal was detected multiple times or where systemic antibiotic treatment for 5 days or more was initiated.
condition:
(
  !#{NeoIPC BSI - no positive culture}
  &&
  (
    d2:hasValue(#{NeoIPC BSI Pathogen 1 value})
    ||
    d2:hasValue(#{NeoIPC BSI Pathogen 2 value})
    ||
    d2:hasValue(#{NeoIPC BSI Pathogen 3 value})
  )
  &&
  (
    !#{NeoIPC BSI Pathogen 1 is recognized pathogen}
    &&
    !#{NeoIPC BSI Pathogen 2 is recognized pathogen}
    &&
    !#{NeoIPC BSI Pathogen 3 is recognized pathogen}
  )
)
&&
(
  (
    (d2:hasValue(#{NeoIPC BSI Pathogen 1 recovered multiple times value}) && (#{NeoIPC BSI Pathogen 1 recovered multiple times value} == true))
    ||
    (d2:hasValue(#{NeoIPC BSI Pathogen 2 recovered multiple times value}) && (#{NeoIPC BSI Pathogen 2 recovered multiple times value} == true))
    ||
    (d2:hasValue(#{NeoIPC BSI Pathogen 3 recovered multiple times value}) && (#{NeoIPC BSI Pathogen 3 recovered multiple times value} == true))
    ||
    (d2:hasValue(#{NeoIPC BSI - Antibiotic treatment}) && (#{NeoIPC BSI - Antibiotic treatment} == true))
  )
  &&
  (
    #{NeoIPC BSI Common sepsis total findings count} < 2
  )
)

name: NeoIPC BSI LCBSI with common commensal detected only once and no antibiotic treatment validation rule
description: Validates the findings in the NeoIPC Core BSI dialog against the LCBSI definition in the protocol where a common commensal was detected only once and no antibiotic treatment was initiated.

name: NeoIPC BSI Length of Stay less than 2
description: Issues a warning if the length of stay at the time of a BSI event is 1 or less
condition: #{NeoIPC Admission type - value} == 3 && #{NeoIPC BSI Length of Stay current value} < 2

name: NeoIPC BSI Organism 1 - name has value
description: Sends a message when a custom name is entered as Organism 1 in the NeoIPC Core BSI dialog
condition: 0 < d2:length(#{NeoIPC BSI Pathogen 1 name value})

name: NeoIPC BSI Organism 2 - name has value
description: Sends a message when a custom name is entered as Organism 2 in the NeoIPC Core BSI dialog
condition: 0 < d2:length(#{NeoIPC BSI Pathogen 2 name value})

name: NeoIPC BSI Organism 3 - name has value
description: Sends a message when a custom name is entered as Organism 3 in the NeoIPC Core BSI dialog
condition: 0 < d2:length(#{NeoIPC BSI Pathogen 3 name value})

name: NeoIPC BSI Pathogen - when recognized pathogen
condition: #{NeoIPC BSI Pathogen 1 is recognized pathogen} || #{NeoIPC BSI Pathogen 2 is recognized pathogen} || #{NeoIPC BSI Pathogen 3 is recognized pathogen}

name: NeoIPC BSI Pathogen - when recognized pathogen or antibiotic treatment
description: Hides the detected multiple times checkbox when a recognized pathogen was detected or an antibiotic treatment for the common commensal was initiated.
condition: #{NeoIPC BSI Pathogen 1 is recognized pathogen} || #{NeoIPC BSI Pathogen 2 is recognized pathogen} || #{NeoIPC BSI Pathogen 3 is recognized pathogen} || #{NeoIPC BSI - Antibiotic treatment}

name: NeoIPC BSI Pathogen - when recognized pathogen or recovered multiple times
description: Hides the antibiotic treatment checkbox when a recognized pathogen was detected or the common commensal was detected multiple times
condition: #{NeoIPC BSI Pathogen 1 is recognized pathogen} || #{NeoIPC BSI Pathogen 2 is recognized pathogen} || #{NeoIPC BSI Pathogen 3 is recognized pathogen} || #{NeoIPC BSI Pathogen 1 recovered multiple times value} || #{NeoIPC BSI Pathogen 2 recovered multiple times value} || #{NeoIPC BSI Pathogen 3 recovered multiple times value}

condition: d2:hasValue( #{NeoIPC NEC Vomiting value} ) && #{NeoIPC NEC Vomiting value}

name: NeoIPC Patient Assign gestation days and weeks
description: Assigns the number of gestation days and weeks from the gestational age input format to program rule variables
condition: d2:hasValue( A{NeoIPC Patient Gestational age value} ) && d2:validatePattern( A{NeoIPC Patient Gestational age value}, '^[2-4]\\d\\+[0-6]$' )

name: NeoIPC Patient Assign total gestation days
description: Calculates the total number of gestation days and weeks from the two program rule variables that contain the weeks and days.
condition: true

name: NeoIPC Patient Birth weight 1500+ grams and gestational age 32+ weeks
description: Raises an error if the entered birth weight is 1500 grams or more and the gestational age is 32 weeks or more.
condition: (( A{NeoIPC Patient Birth weight value} >= 1500 &&  #{NeoIPC Patient Total gestation days} >= 224 ) || ( A{NeoIPC Patient Birth weight value} >= 1500 && #{NeoIPC Patient Total gestation days} == 0 ) || ( #{NeoIPC Patient Total gestation days} >= 224 &&  A{NeoIPC Patient Birth weight value} == 0 )) && ( ! d2:inOrgUnitGroup( 'NEOIPC_ALL_PATIENTS_ELIGIBLE' ) )

name: NeoIPC Patient Birth weight and gestational age mandatory (NeoDeco)
description: Makes both birth weight and gestational age mandatory if the site is a NeoDeco trial site.
condition: d2:inOrgUnitGroup( 'NEOIPC_NEODECO_TRIAL_SITES' )

name: NeoIPC Patient Birth weight mandatory if gestational age missing (regular)
description: Makes birth weight mandatory if gestational age is missing and the site is not a NeoDeco trial site.
condition: !d2:inOrgUnitGroup( 'NEOIPC_NEODECO_TRIAL_SITES' ) && !d2:hasValue( A{NeoIPC Patient Gestational age value} )

name: NeoIPC Patient Gestational age mandatory if birth weight missing (regular)
description: Makes gestational age mandatory if birth weight is missing and the site is not a NeoDeco trial site.
condition: !d2:inOrgUnitGroup( 'NEOIPC_NEODECO_TRIAL_SITES' ) && !d2:hasValue( A{NeoIPC Patient Birth weight value} )

name: NeoIPC Patient Multiple birth is not set
description: Adjusts the dialog when the multiple birth checkbox is not checked.
condition: !A{NeoIPC Patient Multiple birth value}

name: NeoIPC Patient Multiple birth is set
description: Adjusts the dialog when the multiple birth checkbox is checked.
condition: A{NeoIPC Patient Multiple birth value}

name: NeoIPC Patient Show feedback for "Admission Completed"
condition: true

name: NeoIPC Patient Validate gestational age format
description: Checks the format of the value entered into the gestational age input field
condition: d2:hasValue( A{NeoIPC Patient Gestational age value} ) && !d2:validatePattern( A{NeoIPC Patient Gestational age value}, '^[2-4]\\d\\+[0-6]$' )

name: NeoIPC Patient Warn birth weight 1-299 or 5000+
description: Issues a warning when the birth weight is less than 300 grams or more than 5000 grams.
condition: A{NeoIPC Patient Birth weight value} != 0 && (A{NeoIPC Patient Birth weight value} < 300 || A{NeoIPC Patient Birth weight value} >= 5000 )

name: NeoIPC Patient Warn birth weight empty (regular)
description: Issues a warning if the birth weight is empty.
condition: !d2:hasValue( A{NeoIPC Patient Birth weight value} )

name: NeoIPC Patient Warn gestation days 0-160 or 310+
description: Displays a warning if the calculated number of gestation days is less than 161 or greater than 310
condition: #{NeoIPC Patient Total gestation days} != 0 && (#{NeoIPC Patient Total gestation days} < 161) || (#{NeoIPC Patient Total gestation days} >= 310)

name: NeoIPC Patient Warn siblings in birth 7+
description: Issues a warning when the number of siblings in one birth is 7 or more.
condition: A{NeoIPC Patient Siblings in birth value} >= 7

name: NeoIPC SSI - has microbiology results
description: Makes pathogen-related data elements mandatory if the user specifies that microbiology result are available
condition: d2:hasValue(#{NeoIPC SSI Organisms identified from any site}) && #{NeoIPC SSI Organisms identified from any site}

name: NeoIPC SSI - has secondary BSI
description: Makes data elements related to secondary BSI mandatory if the user specifies that a secondary BSI has occurred.
condition: d2:hasValue(#{NeoIPC SSI Secondary bloodstream infection value}) && #{NeoIPC SSI Secondary bloodstream infection value} > 0

name: NeoIPC SSI - infection type deep
description: Hides data elements for superficial and organ/space infections if the infection type is deep
condition: #{NeoIPC SSI Infection type value} == 2

name: NeoIPC SSI - infection type organ/space
description: Hides data elements for superficial and superficial infections if the infection type is organ/space
condition: #{NeoIPC SSI Infection type value} == 3

name: NeoIPC SSI - infection type superficial
description: Hides data elements for deep and organ/space infections if the infection type is superficial
condition: #{NeoIPC SSI Infection type value} == 1

name: NeoIPC SSI - no infection type
description: Hides clinical signs and symptoms data elements until the user selects an infection type
condition: !d2:hasValue(#{NeoIPC SSI Infection type value}) || #{NeoIPC SSI Infection type value} < 1
programRuleActions: EkaiavA2iLK Xr6y6BvahHt ZGHD2MFuXSx hkjtnc9E5N1 nmaWTh7wUXA s9MWNUVZTT5

name: NeoIPC SSI - no microbiology result available
description: Hides pathogen-related data elements unless the user specifies that microbiologic result are available
condition: !d2:hasValue(#{NeoIPC SSI Organisms identified from any site}) || !#{NeoIPC SSI Organisms identified from any site}
programRuleActions: C24AaRjtqB0 DT7sZJJGU6R KsygiciFSXM LpAedkkFnJK Rf5CWdxMG9I SSBT2ZOBDTM XdXlqqgcp5b XxWQ5RRgXz4 YGJBkSY9BRG ZNebHU6Ve9V cs3eMawm5mP eD5X7l2Z16n fYDGBWxfaYk i2nP3llrGmL mU8PpZOXyNx nUSeExvLsb3 odKR6nYRF6x vLEhaFwxCqA vQ3weS2Oj5T wHi0Eb7k9Rm xALTxL5TX7d z1hSeMmEZm6

name: NeoIPC SSI - no secondary BSI
description: Hides data elements related to secondary BSI unless the user specifies that a secondary BSI has occurred.
condition: !d2:hasValue(#{NeoIPC SSI Secondary bloodstream infection value}) || #{NeoIPC SSI Secondary bloodstream infection value} < 1
programRuleActions: Asfbt9in5MF BGS7WqIrkhg CZV4H02SxDT D5ADpomLswl Dw5vsR9wq9c FqepHLG9rVE Hcke6Yp6sWK IQMVixKHIp8 Inbw2UwKdpo SDd6PPHGXxy SegNT3LTXT6 UAc2iOrETsQ XSwYAItKZuY XvrSQ5Xu2s3 YOMSpHMwrwa gmbDl7TNNGh kitTSOXAMz3 lS1EfjpNob7 lueG3PXCahd veaBzbEaShf x06e8uF9bvm yv2dtzKM44V

name: NeoIPC SSI - set organisms identified from any site
condition: true

name: NeoIPC SSI - superficial infection
description: Adjusts the dialog when only the skin is involved
condition: #{NeoIPC SSI Infection involves skin value} && !#{NeoIPC SSI Infection involves deep soft tissues value} && !#{NeoIPC SSI Infection involves parts deeper than fascial muscular layers value}

name: NeoIPC SSI Deep incisional SSI validation rule
description: Validates the findings in the NeoIPC Core SSI dialog against the deep incisional SSI definition in the protocol

name: NeoIPC SSI Organ/space SSI validation rule
description: Validates the findings in the NeoIPC Core SSI dialog against the organ/space SSI definition in the protocol

name: NeoIPC SSI Organism 1 - name has value
description: Sends a message when a custom name is entered as Organism 1 in the NeoIPC Core SSI dialog
condition: 0 < d2:length(#{NeoIPC SSI Pathogen 1 name value})

name: NeoIPC SSI Organism 2 - name has value
description: Sends a message when a custom name is entered as Organism 2 in the NeoIPC Core SSI dialog
condition: 0 < d2:length(#{NeoIPC SSI Pathogen 2 name value})

name: NeoIPC SSI Organism 3 - name has value
description: Sends a message when a custom name is entered as Organism 3 in the NeoIPC Core SSI dialog
condition: 0 < d2:length(#{NeoIPC SSI Pathogen 3 name value})

name: NeoIPC SSI Secondary BSI Organism 1 - name has value
description: Sends a message when a custom name is entered as Organism 1 in the secondary BSI section of the NeoIPC Core SSI dialog
condition: 0 < d2:length(#{NeoIPC SSI Secondary BSI pathogen 1 name value})

name: NeoIPC SSI Secondary BSI Organism 2 - name has value
description: Sends a message when a custom name is entered as Organism 2 in the secondary BSI section of the NeoIPC Core SSI dialog
condition: 0 < d2:length(#{NeoIPC SSI Secondary BSI pathogen 2 name value})

name: NeoIPC SSI Secondary BSI Organism 3 - name has value
description: Sends a message when a custom name is entered as Organism 3 in the secondary BSI section of the NeoIPC Core SSI dialog
condition: 0 < d2:length(#{NeoIPC SSI Secondary BSI pathogen 3 name value})

name: NeoIPC SSI Set Day of life
description: Automatically sets the day of life for the current SSI event
condition: true

name: NeoIPC SSI Set Length of Stay
description: Automatically sets the Length of Stay for the current event
condition: true

name: NeoIPC SSI Superficial incisional SSI validation rule
description: Validates the findings in the NeoIPC Core SSI dialog against the superficial incisional SSI definition in the protocol

name: NeoIPC SURGERY Set Length of Stay
description: Automatically sets the Length of Stay for the current event
condition: true

name: NeoIPC Surgical Procedure Set Day of life
description: Automatically sets the day of life for the current Surgical Procedure event
condition: true

name: NeoIPC Surveillance end AB days - validate
condition: #{NeoIPC Surveillance end AB days - current event value} > #{NeoIPC Surveillance end Patient days - current event value}

name: NeoIPC Surveillance end CVC days - validate
condition: #{NeoIPC Surveillance end CVC days - current event value} > #{NeoIPC Surveillance end Patient days - current event value}

name: NeoIPC Surveillance end Human milk days - validate
condition: #{NeoIPC Surveillance end Human milk days - current event value} > #{NeoIPC Surveillance end Patient days - current event value}

name: NeoIPC Surveillance end INV days - validate
condition: #{NeoIPC Surveillance end INV days - current event value} > #{NeoIPC Surveillance end Patient days - current event value}

name: NeoIPC Surveillance end Kangaroo care days - validate
condition: #{NeoIPC Surveillance end Kangaroo care days - current event value} > #{NeoIPC Surveillance end Patient days - current event value}

name: NeoIPC Surveillance end NIV + INV days - validate
condition: (#{NeoIPC Surveillance end NIV days - current event value} + #{NeoIPC Surveillance end INV days - current event value})> #{NeoIPC Surveillance end Patient days - current event value}

name: NeoIPC Surveillance end NIV days - validate
condition: #{NeoIPC Surveillance end NIV days - current event value} > #{NeoIPC Surveillance end Patient days - current event value}

name: NeoIPC Surveillance end PVC days - validate
condition: #{NeoIPC Surveillance end PVC days - current event value} > #{NeoIPC Surveillance end Patient days - current event value}

name: NeoIPC Surveillance end Patient days - set
description: Automatically calculate the patient days.
condition: true

name: NeoIPC Surveillance end Probiotic days - validate
condition: #{NeoIPC Surveillance end Probiotic days - current event value} > #{NeoIPC Surveillance end Patient days - current event value}
